snippet.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
snippet.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. written and directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna while Jagapathi Babu, Prakash Raj, Dhananjay, and Sunil play supporting roles.

The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

#PushpaвАЛ #IntroducingPushpaRaj #AlluArjunвАЛ #PushpaTeaser #PreludeOfPushparaj #RashmikaвАЛ #Faasil #SukumarвАЛ #DSP #MythriMovieMakersвАЛ 

Directed by Sukumar
Produced by Naveen Yerneni, Y. Ravi Shankar

Music by Devi Sri Prasad
Cinematography: Miroslaw Kuba Brozek
Edited by Karthika Srinivas
Production Companies: Mythri Movie Makers, Muttamsetty Media
Release Date:13 August 2021

en-GB.title: Introducing Pushpa Raj | Allu Arjun | Pushpa | Rashmika | Fahadh Faasil | DSP | Sukumar
en-GB.description:
Introducing Pushpa Raj on Mythri Movie Makers. written and directed by Sukumar. Produced by Naveen Yerneni and Y. Ravi Shankar of Mythri Movie Makers in association with Muttamsetty Media, the film stars Allu Arjun, Fahadh Faasil and Rashmika Mandanna while Jagapathi Babu, Prakash Raj, Dhananjay, and Sunil play supporting roles.

The film's music is composed by Devi Sri Prasad, with cinematography and editing were performed by Miroslaw Kuba Brozek and Karthika Srinivas respectively. The film is scheduled to release on 13 August 2021, in Telugu along with dubbed versions in Malayalam, Tamil, Hindi and Kannada languages.

snippet.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of вАУ Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments belowвА¶

#VYRLOriginals #RubinaDilaik #ParasChhabra

localized.title: Galat (Official Video) Asees Kaur | Rubina Dilaik, Paras Chhabra | Vikas | Raj Fatehpur
localized.description:
VYRL Originals presents Galat by Asees Kaur and starring Bigg Boss fans two favourite contestants - Big Boss 14 Winner Rubina Dilaik and Paras Chhabra. Keeping melancholy as the central theme of this song, the hit trio of вАУ Vikas as composer, Sunny Vik as the producer and the lyricist Raj Fatehpur have worked their magic yet again on Galat. Directed By TRU Makers the story narrates a tale of love and betrayal, with stunning performances by Rubina and Paras as the protagonist who will compel you to see the story unfold till the end. 

Which scene or lyrics impressed you the most? Tell us in the comments belowвА¶

#VYRLOriginals #RubinaDilaik #ParasChhabra

snippet.title: Lehja | Abhi Dutt ft. Faisu & Jannat | Vikram M | Official Video | Romantic Song 2021 | Blive Music
snippet.description:
Sanjay Kukreja and BLive Music presents the most romantic hindi song of the year "Lehja" sung by Abhi Dutt Featuring Faisu & Jannat Zubair. The lyrics are penned by Azeem Shirazi and the music is directed by Vikram Montrose song directed by Rahul Shetty. This latest song is created by Mahesh Kukreja

#Lehja #Fainat #AbhiDutt #NewHindiSong #LoveSongs2021

Composer- Vikram Montrose

Song Programmed and Arranged - Vikram Montrose

snippet.title: Bepanah Pyaar (Official Video) Payal Dev, Yasser Desai | Surbhi Chandna, Sharad Malhotra | Shabbir A
snippet.description:
VYRL Originals brings to you Bepanah Pyaar composed and sung by Payal Dev collaborating up with the talented singer Yasser Desai for the first time. Reuniting after their successful pairing together in Naagin 5, Surbhi Chandna & Sharad MalhotraвАЩs sizzling chemistry is sure make you fall in love with them all over again. This beautiful romantic song has been written by veteran Bollywood lyricist Shabbir Ahmed and Payal Dev.

#VYRLOriginals #SurbhiChandna #SharadMalhotra

Directed by Arif Khan, the stunning video narrates a thrilling story of love, treachery and action with a surprising plot twist in the end. Do comment & mention below your favourite #sharbhi moments from the video.

snippet.title: Goodbye Old Stuff! Hammer Jam is BACK! (Clash Of Clans Official)
snippet.description:
The Hammer Jam event is back and it's the season of upgrades! Take full advantage of the 50% Home Village building cost reduction, and get ready for the first update of the year that's coming veeeery soon! рЯСА


Follow us on our Socials!
Twitter вЦЇ https://twitter.com/ClashofClans/
Instagram вЦЇhttps://www.instagram.com/clashofclans 
Facebook вЦЇhttps://www.facebook.com/ClashofClans 

Attack. Defend. Strategize. Download for free for mobile devices. http://supr.cl/ThisArmy

From rage-¬≠filled Barbarians with glorious mustaches to pyromaniac wizards, raise your own army and lead your clan to victory! Build your village to fend off raiders, battle against millions of players worldwide, and forge a powerful clan with others to destroy enemy clans.
PLEASE NOTE! Clash of Clans is free to download and play, however some game items can also be purchased for real money 

Also, under our Terms of Service and Privacy Policy, you must be at least 13 years of age to play or download Clash of Clans.
A network connection is also required.

FEATURES
- Build your village into an unbeatable fortress 
- Raise your own army of Barbarians, Archers, Hog Riders, Wizards, Dragons and other mighty fighters
- Battle with players worldwide and take their Trophies
- Join together with other players to form the ultimate Clan
- Fight against rival Clans in epic Clan Wars 
- Build 18 unique units with multiple levels of upgrades
- Discover your favorite attacking army from countless combinations of troops, spells, Heroes and Clan reinforcements 
- Defend your village with a multitude of Cannons, Towers, Mortars, Bombs, Traps and Walls
- Fight against the Goblin King in a campaign through the realm

Chief, are you having problems? Visit http://supercell.helpshift.com/a/clas...

Privacy Policy:
http://www.supercell.net/privacy-policy/

Terms of Service:
http://www.supercell.net/terms-of-ser...

http://www.supercell.net/parents

snippet.title: Best of CID (Bangla) - а¶ЄаІАа¶Жа¶За¶°аІА -  Baby's Kidnapping  - Full Episode
snippet.description:
Click here to Subscribe to SONY AATH Channel: https://www.youtube.com/channel/UCBz9qbqujcjIavFmBJW2oZw?sub_confirmation=1

A child gets kidnapped from a hospital by an unknown lady. CID are able to identify her using CCTV footage and get to know from a police station that she is not a known criminal, but a victim of domestic violence- and that she seems to know he father of the child. She is soon found un-alive, and the alarm bells sound. But with the father insisting that the has nothing to do with this, and with no sign of where the child might be, will CID be able to solve this one?

About CID:
--------------------
CID is an Indian detective television anthology series about India's Crime Investigation Department, created by B. P. Singh for Sony Entertainment Television India and Sony Entertainment Television Asia.  Following a pilot episode on 29 April 1997, the series premiered on 21 January 1998 and is the longest-running television series in India, having completed 19 years in January 2017 and entering the 20th year of its run. The show airs on Saturday and Sunday nights at 10:30 PM IST.

A child gets kidnapped from a hospital by an unknown lady. CID are able to identify her using CCTV footage and get to know from a police station that she is not a known criminal, but a victim of domestic violence- and that she seems to know he father of the child. She is soon found un-alive, and the alarm bells sound. But with the father insisting that the has nothing to do with this, and with no sign of where the child might be, will CID be able to solve this one?

About CID:
--------------------
CID is an Indian detective television anthology series about India's Crime Investigation Department, created by B. P. Singh for Sony Entertainment Television India and Sony Entertainment Television Asia.  Following a pilot episode on 29 April 1997, the series premiered on 21 January 1998 and is the longest-running television series in India, having completed 19 years in January 2017 and entering the 20th year of its run. The show airs on Saturday and Sunday nights at 10:30 PM IST.

вАШа¶Ца¶Ња¶≤аІЗа¶¶ а¶ЃаІБа¶єа¶ња¶Йа¶¶аІНа¶¶аІАа¶® а¶Ьа¶Ња¶®а¶§аІЗ а¶Ъа¶ЊаІЯвАЩ а¶Яа¶Ха¶ґаІЗа¶Њ-а¶§аІЗ а¶Па¶ђа¶Ња¶∞аІЗа¶∞ а¶Жа¶≤аІЗа¶Ња¶Ъа¶®а¶Ња¶∞ а¶ђа¶ња¶ЈаІЯ: а¶§аІЛа¶Ѓа¶Ња¶∞ а¶Ьа¶®аІНа¶ѓ а¶єаІЗ а¶ЄаІНа¶ђа¶Ња¶ІаІАа¶®а¶§а¶ЊаІЈ а¶Еа¶®аІБа¶ЈаІНа¶†а¶Ња¶®а¶Яа¶ња¶§аІЗ а¶Еа¶§а¶ња¶•а¶њ а¶єа¶ња¶ЄаІЗа¶ђаІЗ а¶∞аІЯаІЗа¶ЫаІЗа¶® а¶ЃаІОа¶ЄаІНа¶ѓ а¶У а¶™аІНа¶∞а¶Ња¶£а¶ња¶Єа¶ЃаІНа¶™а¶¶ а¶Ѓа¶®аІНа¶§аІНа¶∞аІА а¶ґ а¶Ѓ а¶∞аІЗа¶Ьа¶Ња¶Йа¶≤ а¶Ха¶∞а¶ња¶Ѓ а¶Па¶ђа¶В а¶ђа¶ња¶Па¶®а¶™а¶ња¶¶а¶≤аІАа¶ѓа¶Љ а¶Єа¶Ва¶Єа¶¶ а¶Єа¶¶а¶ЄаІНа¶ѓ а¶ЃаІЛ. а¶єа¶Ња¶∞аІБа¶®аІБа¶∞ а¶∞а¶ґаІАа¶¶аІЈ а¶¶аІЗа¶ЦаІБа¶® а¶Па¶ђа¶В а¶Ьа¶Ња¶®а¶Ња¶® а¶Жа¶™а¶®а¶Ња¶∞ а¶Ѓа¶§а¶Ња¶Ѓа¶§аІЈ

snippet.title: Sonar Daan || Notun Bangla Golpo || Bangla Cartoon || Magical Cartoon || Ssoftoons Golpoguccho
snippet.description:
We bring to you Sonar Daan
This is our latest Magical story. In this, we get to meet a quite unfortunate fisherman who was good from the heart. Come on and take this journey with us in which we see him prosper due to his kind-heartedness.

Caution: Not for individuals below 14years of age

snippet.title: Size Zero (2021) NEW RELEASED Full Hindi Dubbed South Movie | Anushka Shetty, Arya & Prakash Raj
snippet.description:
Soundarya aka Sweety is an overweight, brave and an independent woman. She is slightly conscious about her weight but does not let it affect her. She falls in love with Abhishek, who was once a prospective groom for her but they both reject each other. However, both Sweety and Abhi continue to remain friends and together take on the Wight Loss clinics Mafia, Sathyanand (Prakash Raj). 

Censor Certification Number:- VIL/2/41/2021-MUM
Movie (Hindi Dubbed):- Size Zero 
Original Movie Name: Size Zero in Telugu
StarCast:- Anushka Shetty, Arya, Prakash Raj, Sonal Chauhan 
Music:- M. M. Keeravani
Producer:- Prasad V Potluri
Director:- Prakash Kovelamudi

snippet.title: PM Modi receives ceremonial welcome in Dhaka, Bangladesh
snippet.description:
Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi arrived in Dhaka for his visit to Bangladesh at the invitation of Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina. This is the historic visit to celebrate Mujib Borsho- the birth centenary of Sheikh Mujibur Rahman ; 50 years of the establishment of diplomatic ties between India and Bangladesh; and 50 years of BangladeshвАЩs war of liberation. In a special gesture, Prime Minister Sheikh Hasina and Ministers from her cabinet welcomed Prime Minister Modi at the Hazrat Shahjalal International Airport. A salute of 19 guns and Guard of honour were accorded to Prime Minister Shri Narendra Modi.

snippet.title: Protesters, police clash in Bangladesh over India PM Modi's visit
snippet.description:
Hundreds of demonstrators protesting against the visit of Indian Prime Minister Narendra Modi clashed with police in the Bangladesh capital of Dhaka on Friday.

The violence escalated with protesters throwing projectiles, while police fired rubber bullets, threw projectiles, and deployed water cannons in the area near the Baitul Mukarram National Mosque.

The protesters accuse Modi of stoking religious tensions, according to local media reports, which added that 40 people were injured from Friday's clash.

In his first visit to a foreign country since the coronavirus outbreak, Modi will be in Bangladesh for two days, where he will take part in the National Day celebrations of the country as the guest of honour.

For more info, please go to http://www.globalnews.ca

snippet.title: Thalaivi | Official Trailer (Hindi) | Kangana Ranaut | Arvind Swamy | Vijay | 23rd April
snippet.description:

Lyrics -
Karda rahen ignore ve mainu
Labhgyi lagda hor ve tenu
Je tu pyar naal rakhna hi nahi 
Fer tu vapis tor ve mainu
Ik paasa karde yaar.. Asi tere nahi rehna
Marjaaneya tu hun nahi karda pyar..Asi tere nahi rehna

Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda
Tethon ramdev ton ve routine nahi chadya janda
Tu reliance chalauna hain..Tethon time nai kadhya janda

Kade bahr laja
Koi film dikha
Kade pyar naal
Koi gal sunaa
Banya rehnaa talwar asi tere nai rehna
Marjaneya
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna

Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda
Koi labh lyi hou chudail 
Chakkar koi paaya lagda
Sade pichon ve muuh
Kaala karvaaya lagda

Sanu milna nahi 
Milauna nahi
Babbu je pyar
Jatauna nahi
Ki pauna fer achaar Asi tere nahi rehna
Marhanevala
Tu hun nahi karda pyar asi tere nai rehna



#NehaKakkar #RubinaDilaik #AbhinavShukla

snippet.description:
Sanjay Kukreja and BLive Music presents new official video song Teri Aadat soulful vocal by ABHI DUTT featuring Siddharth Nigam and Anushka Sen. The lyrics are penned by Ishaan Khan and the music directed by Aishwarya Tripathi. Nitin Fcp & Nadeem Akhtar have directed the video. This latest song is created by Mahesh Kukreja.

Welcome to  NOAKHALITV Channel on YouTube. NOAKHALITV offers  mix of programs such as news bulletins, current affairs, talk shows, educational, religious, politics related programs, drama, reality shows, prank show and other entertainment programs. We Broadcast news and entertainment programs.
noakhali tv is a community based channel in Noakhali, Bangladesh. The channel is only based on Noakhali, Feni & Lakshmipur, aiming to improve public awareness.

вЮ§NOAKHALI - а¶®аІЛа¶ѓа¶Ља¶Ња¶Ца¶Ња¶≤аІА
Noakhali is a district in South-eastern Bangladesh. It is located in the Chittagong Division. Noakhali district, whose earlier name was Bhulua, was established in 1821. It was named Noakhali in 1868.

вЮ§LAKSHMIPUR or LAXMIPUR DISTRICT - а¶≤а¶ХаІНа¶ЈаІНа¶ЃаІАа¶™аІБа¶∞ а¶ЬаІЗа¶≤а¶Њ
(Lakshmipur Jela also Lakshmipur Zila) with an area of 1455.96 km¬≤, is a district of Bangladesh. It is bordered by Chandpur District to the north, Bhola and Noakhali districts to the south, Noakhali District to the east, and Barisal and Bhola districts to the west.
 It is located in the Chittagong Division. 

вЮ§FENI  DISTRICT - а¶ЂаІЗа¶®аІА а¶ЬаІЗа¶≤а¶Њ
Feni is a district located in the South-Eastern part of Bangladesh Administrative division of Chittagong . As of 2015, the district's estimated population stood at 1,437,371, making it the ninth-most populous district in Chittagong Division. Feni was the part of Greater Noakhali. The administrative hub of the district is in Feni Sadar, in the central section of the district. The original name of the district was Shamshernagar, which served as a sub-district under the district of Noakhali until 15 February 1984.[1] The district consists of six sub-districts: Sonagazi, Fulgazi, Parshuram, Daganbhuiyan, Chhagalnaiya and Feni Sadar.

NOAKHALI - а¶®аІЛа¶ѓа¶Ља¶Ња¶Ца¶Ња¶≤аІА - NOAKHALI TV - а¶®аІЛаІЯа¶Ња¶Ца¶Ња¶≤аІА а¶Яа¶ња¶≠а¶њ

вЮ§MAIJDEE : 
Maijdee is a town in south eastern Bangladesh, located in Noakhali District, part of the Chittagong Division. Thugarbhanga is the administrative center of Noakhali district and its main town. It is also known as Maijdee court town. It consists of 9 wards and 36 mahallas. It has an area of 12.61 km¬≤.

вЮ§GANDHI ASHRAM : The Gandhi Ashram Trust, also called the Ambika-Kaliganga Charitable Trust, is a philanthropic and development organization working in Noakhali since 1946 with Gandhian philosophy of rural development.

вЮ§NOAKHALI SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY : 
Noakhali Science and Technology University is a public university in the coastal terrain Noakhali of Bangladesh. It is the 27th public university and fifth science and technology university in Bangladesh. Its foundation stone was laid on 11 October 2003 and academic activities started on 22 June 2006.

вЮ§GANDHI ASHRAM : The Gandhi Ashram Trust, also called the Ambika-Kaliganga Charitable Trust, is a philanthropic and development organization working in Noakhali since 1946 with Gandhian philosophy of rural development.

вЮ§NOAKHALI SCIENCE AND TECHNOLOGY UNIVERSITY : 
Noakhali Science and Technology University is a public university in the coastal terrain Noakhali of Bangladesh. It is the 27th public university and fifth science and technology university in Bangladesh. Its foundation stone was laid on 11 October 2003 and academic activities started on 22 June 2006.

noakhali tv is a community based channel in Noakhali, Bangladesh. The channel is only based on Noakhali, Feni & Lakshmipur, aiming to improve public awareness.

вЮ§NOAKHALI - а¶®аІЛа¶ѓа¶Ља¶Ња¶Ца¶Ња¶≤аІА
Noakhali is a district in South-eastern Bangladesh. It is located in the Chittagong Division. Noakhali district, whose earlier name was Bhulua, was established in 1821. It was named Noakhali in 1868.

вЮ§LAKSHMIPUR or LAXMIPUR DISTRICT - а¶≤а¶ХаІНа¶ЈаІНа¶ЃаІАа¶™аІБа¶∞ а¶ЬаІЗа¶≤а¶Њ
(Lakshmipur Jela also Lakshmipur Zila) with an area of 1455.96 km¬≤, is a district of Bangladesh. It is bordered by Chandpur District to the north, Bhola and Noakhali districts to the south, Noakhali District to the east, and Barisal and Bhola districts to the west.
 It is located in the Chittagong Division. 

вЮ§FENI  DISTRICT - а¶ЂаІЗа¶®аІА а¶ЬаІЗа¶≤а¶Њ
Feni is a district located in the South-Eastern part of Bangladesh Administrative division of Chittagong . As of 2015, the district's estimated population stood at 1,437,371, making it the ninth-most populous district in Chittagong Division. Feni was the part of Greater Noakhali. The administrative hub of the district is in Feni Sadar, in the central section of the district. The original name of the district was Shamshernagar, which served as a sub-district under the district of Noakhali until 15 February 1984.[1] The district consists of six sub-districts: Sonagazi, Fulgazi, Parshuram, Daganbhuiyan, Chhagalnaiya and Feni Sadar.

snippet.title: Love Mashup 2021 | Hasan S. Iqbal | Dristy Anam
snippet.description:
HereвАЩs another gift for all the #hasanians
My third Mashup with Dristy on this channel, 
And ItвАЩs always a pleasure to work with Dristy Anam ,whoвАЩs one of the most amazing vocalist and an amazing human being, I love working with.We give our best when it comes to preparing something good for our fans.
We read every comments from you guys and you all wanted a new mashup so we planned this вАШLove MashupвАЩ of Folk & Movie songs, just for all of you. We hope you all will love it.
Thanks for always showing so much love and support towards us.
ENJOY

snippet.title: 33 Useful Life Hacks For Smart PARENTS
snippet.description:
If your kids have been giving you a hard time lately, we sympathize with you. Being a parent is not an easy task, but itвАЩs so rewarding! So, today we have some hacks we want to share with you to give you a helping hand. YouвАЩll learn a few quick fixes for everyday problems, DIY versions of necessary devices, and cute ideas for outfits. Toddlers can be sneaky and quick, so we have a DIY playpen you can use to keep them in one place while during playtime.

Not knowing what to wear can be a huge time-drainer. So weвАЩll show you an awesome hack to help you save time when getting your little ones ready. No baby monitor? No problem! You can use your tablet and your phone to set up a monitoring system to keep an eye on your kiddos. Ironing mishaps can happen you anyone, but that burned shirt might make a great kiddie apron!

4:43 вАУ Outfit organizer
7:34 вАУ Tablet and phone baby monitor
10:36 вАУ DIY apron
